name: Taiwan AI Weather App
description: Scalable cross-platform weather app using a decoupled architecture with Flutter, Python, Firebase, and Cloudflare R2. Features automated CI/CD pipelines and multi-layer API security.

name: MQTT-based IoT Smart Classroom
description: Real-time smart classroom system using ESP32 MCUs and a Raspberry Pi MQTT broker. Integrated YOLOv8 for occupancy counting to automate HVAC and lighting control.

name: HRV-based Sleep Stage Classification
description: Applied Empirical Mode Decomposition (EMD) on Heart Rate Variability (HRV) signals to extract time-frequency domain features (e.g., SDNN, RMSSD, HF). Trained and evaluated tree-based ensemble models (Random Forest, Decision Tree) to perform 5-class sleep stage classification (Wake, N1, N2, N3, REM)

name: Air Pollution Analysis – Kaohsiung Liveability
description: Analyzed air quality monitoring data across Kaohsiung to assess residential liveability. Conducted Exploratory Data Analysis and descriptive statistics to the datasets, producing actionable insights for pollution control policy.
